privileged_info_summary: The M51 galaxy image is real data from ImageJ's public repository (https://wsr.imagej.net/images/m51.tif), measuring 320x510 pixels in 16-bit TIFF format. The Whirlpool Galaxy contains approximately 1284 young star clusters according to astronomical research. Filter parameters of 40 pixels (large structures) and 3 pixels (small structures) are confirmed as standard ImageJ/Fiji defaults. CRITICAL DISCREPANCY: Metadata declares cluster count range of 100-1000, but the verifier code (line 79) actually checks '80 <= count <= 1200', allowing both lower minimum (80 vs 100) and higher maximum (1200 vs 1000). The verifier's own comment claims '100-1000 is the expected range' but this contradicts the actual code implementation.
